origins.appearance: hands veined faintly violet from years of holding light still
origins.backstory: You kept the Stalnaz lattice humming until the Censorate decided light itself needed a permit.

origins.appearance: pale to the lips, with old ledger-scars laddered up both forearms
origins.magicalSignature: a red tally settling its own accounts
origins.backstory: In Ryolan every favor is banked in the vein; you left owing exactly one life, and it was yours.

origins.appearance: broad-shouldered, smelling of cold hillside, one eye ringed in charcoal
origins.magicalSignature: a muttered grudge tightening like a knot
origins.backstory: The goatfolk of Gontark pay their debts in curses; you are carrying seven that are not yours.
